description: PostToolUse(Bash) recorder. Appends genuinely-failed commands (non-zero exit, after a noise filter that drops signals, grep no-match, test/lint red, and conditionals) to the per-repo log <git-root>/.claude/logs/failed-commands.jsonl. harness-curator reads these logs to turn recurring failures into harness fixes. Never blocks: always exits 0. Canonical registration lives in the plugin's top-level hooks.json; this file documents the bundle.
